blended.narrative: Breckenridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 29".
